#
sysname SW-UNREACHABLE
#
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description INTERFACE-LOCAL
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
#
interface Eth-Trunk1.100
 description CIRCUITO-TRANSITO
 vlan-type dot1q 100
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.252
#
ip route-static 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.0.2
ip route-static 200.200.200.0 255.255.255.252 10.0.0.2
ip route-static 172.16.0.0 255.240.0.0 198.51.100.1
#
return
